articles.title: Photos: Highlights from the St. Patrick’s Day Parade
articles.description:
See the shenanigans.

The post Photos: Highlights from the St. Patrick’s Day Parade appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Boston's St. Patrick's Day Parade featured over 100 participating groups on March 12, 2023.
Thousands of residents and visitors gathered along the parade route in South Boston.
The event boosted local businesses, with increased sales reported by nearby restaurants and shops.

articles.title: 2 men arrested after fatal overdose on Cape Cod prompts monthslong, multi-town investigation
articles.description:
What began as an investigation into a November 2025 fatal overdose escalated into a wider series of searches by law enforcement.

The post 2 men arrested after fatal overdose on Cape Cod prompts monthslong, multi-town investigation appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Two men were arrested following a months-long investigation into a November 2025 overdose.
The investigation involved multiple towns across Cape Cod and surrounding areas.
Boston residents may see increased law enforcement efforts targeting drug-related crimes.

articles.title: ‘SNL’ recap: Best moments from Harry Styles hosting ‘Saturday Night Live’
articles.description:
Pop star and former One Direction singer Harry Styles pulled double duty on the March 14 episode of "Saturday Night Live," serving as both host and musical guest.

The post ‘SNL’ recap: Best moments from Harry Styles hosting ‘Saturday Night Live’ appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Harry Styles hosted and performed on 'SNL' on March 14, 2026.
Boston residents enjoyed a lively episode featuring Styles' comedic and musical talents.
The event boosted local interest in live entertainment and cultural events.
